caption: A man wearing a tall, silver, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a small red bowtie, and light-colored suspenders. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and various clothing items, including a "LEE" brand garment. On-screen logos featuring a microphone icon are visible, with text that reads "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains in place, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from his side up toward his chest and then outward. His facial expression shifts as he speaks, and his hand movements indicate active communication throughout the sequence.
